fields.label: Reservation Type
fields.options:
Individual
Corporate
Group
House Use
Complimentary
OTA
fields.description: The reservation type this rule applies to. Leave blank to create a catch-all fallback rule.

fields.label: Charge Category
fields.options:
Room
Restaurant
Bar
Laundry
Minibar
Spa
Transport
Other
fields.description: Type of charge this rule applies to. Leave blank to match all charge categories for the reservation type.

fields.label: Payer
fields.options:
Guest
Corporate Account
Group Master
OTA Virtual Card
Internal (Cost Centre)
fields.description: Who pays this charge. Guest: bill to the individual guest customer. Corporate Account: bill to the linked corporate_customer. Group Master: bill to the group master customer. OTA Virtual Card: bill to the OTA's virtual card/account. Internal: zero-revenue internal cost allocation.

fields.label: Priority
fields.description: Lower number = higher priority. When multiple rules match, the rule with the lowest priority number wins.

fields.label: Active
fields.description: Only active rules are evaluated by the billing routing resolver.

fields.label: Optional Filters
fields.description: These filters narrow this rule to specific corporate accounts or OTA channels. Leave blank to apply the rule to all reservations of the given type.

fields.label: Corporate Customer
fields.description: When set, this rule only applies to reservations linked to this specific corporate customer. Useful for per-account billing overrides.

fields.label: OTA Channel
fields.description: When set, this rule only applies to OTA reservations from this specific channel.

fields.label: Notes
fields.description: Internal notes explaining why this routing rule exists (e.g. contract terms, audit trail).
